name: PNEUMOCOCCAL PNEUMONIA

demographics.Frequency: 15% of all adulthood pneumonias, uncommon in childhood; peaks in winter + early

distribution: extensive airspace consolidation abutting against visceral pleura (lobar / beyond confines of
discriminating_features: extensive airspace consolidation abutting against visceral pleura (lobar / beyond confines of
pleural effusion (parapneumonic transudate) uncommon with antibiotic therapy

general: extensive airspace consolidation abutting against visceral pleura (lobar / beyond confines of
pleural effusion (parapneumonic transudate) uncommon with antibiotic therapy
effusion may be only presentation (esp. in COPD)
round pneumonia = sharply defined round lesion

clinical.Prognosis: prompt response to antibiotics (if without complications); 5% mortality rate
clinical.Cx: meningitis, endocarditis, septic arthritis, empyema (now rarely seen)
